description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The front facade features a central wooden door flanked by two rectangular windows with white muntins, providing a symmetrical appearance. The side and rear walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, with the side walls each containing a pair of matching rectangular windows. The roof has a moderate overhang, adding to the traditional cabin aesthetic and offering some protection from the elements. The overall structure is compact and sturdy, with no visible porch or decorative trim. The cabin's design is simple and functional, suitable for residential or small-scale urban use.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, symmetrical front windows, and a central wooden door. The structure is compact, sturdy, and features horizontal plank siding.
description_view_0: Front view showing a central wooden door and two rectangular windows with white muntins on either side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying horizontal wooden planks and two rectangular windows positioned centrally.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain horizontal wooden planks and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with two centrally placed rectangular windows.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, covered in reddish-brown shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Six rectangular windows in total: two symmetrically placed on the front facade, two on each side wall, all of similar size and shape, arranged in pairs
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade between two windows
